analysis_commentary: Mixed but within variance. last_probe legal_mass=0.632 vs baseline 0.597 (slight up), max_prob=0.294 vs 0.14 (2× worse direction but still under 0.90). 10-min checkpoint clean: legal_mass~0.55, max~0.18. pEnt similar to baseline (6.45-6.52). 1 arena, no promotion. The legal_mass bump and max_prob bump partly cancel — calling neutral rather than improved.
